LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENTS RED ROCKS OPTICAL CORPORATION AND ZOOM EYEWORKS, INC.'S HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE AWARD OF HONORABLE WILLIAM CAHILL (RET.) HAVING BEEN CONFIRMED BY ORDER OF THIS COURT ON OCTOBER 26, 2012, AND NO STATEMENT OF DECISION HAVING BEEN REQUESTED BY ANY PARTY, THIS COURT HEREBY ENTERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RED ROCKS OPTICAL CORPORATION AND ZOOM EYEWORKS, INC., IN CONFORMITY WITH THE ARBITRATION AWARD ATTACHED HERETO. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION DEC-09-2014 DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PER LOCAL RULE 8.9 (E) AS TO TOM MELIN. NO APPEARANCE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
